fields.title: Web Development
fields.short_description: Custom web apps built with modern tech.

fields.title: Cloud & DevOps
fields.short_description: Scalable cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and container orchestration.
fields.full_description: We architect resilient cloud platforms on AWS, Azure, and GCP with automated deployment pipelines, Kubernetes orchestration, and zero-downtime deployments.

fields.title: AI & Machine Learning
fields.short_description: Intelligent systems powered by ML, NLP, and computer vision.
fields.full_description: From predictive analytics to generative AI, we build intelligent systems that learn from your data. Our ML solutions include recommendation engines, NLP, computer vision, and LLM-powered assistants.

fields.title: UI/UX Design
fields.short_description: Human-centered design that delights users and drives conversions.
fields.full_description: We craft beautiful, intuitive interfaces backed by user research, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing. Every pixel is intentional and every interaction feels effortless.

fields.title: IT Consultancy
fields.short_description: Strategic technology consulting to future-proof your business.
fields.full_description: Our consultants help you navigate digital transformation, choose the right tech stack, optimize architecture, and align technology with business goals for maximum ROI.

fields.title: Quality Assurance
fields.short_description: Comprehensive testing to ship bug-free software with confidence.
fields.full_description: Automated and manual testing across unit, integration, end-to-end, and performance testing. We ensure your software is reliable, secure, and performant at scale.

fields.title: Digital Marketing
fields.short_description: Data-driven marketing strategies that grow your audience and revenue.
fields.full_description: SEO, content marketing, paid acquisition, and analytics dashboards. We turn data into growth with measurable, ROI-focused campaigns.

fields.quote: TechNova transformed our entire payment infrastructure. Their team reduced our latency by 88% and the platform now handles 5,000+ concurrent users flawlessly.
The level of attention to detail is unmatched. They delivered ahead of schedule and our flash sale revenue increased 300% year-over-year.
Working with TechNova was a game-changer. They built a HIPAA-compliant platform serving 50,000+ patients with zero security incidents in 18 months.
Their AI team built a real-time analytics pipeline processing 1.2M+ events daily with 94% predictive accuracy. Absolutely stellar work.
From strategy to deployment, TechNova delivered a scalable cloud platform that cut our infrastructure costs by 40% while doubling performance.
TechNova's security-first approach gave us SOC 2 compliance in record time. Their zero-trust architecture passed every penetration test on the first try.
They built an IoT dashboard monitoring 12,000+ smart meters in real time. We cut energy waste by 35% across our entire grid network.
The route optimization engine TechNova built saves us 18,000 gallons of fuel monthly. ROI was achieved in just 4 months. Outstanding engineering.
Our learning platform went from 0 to 250,000 active learners in 8 months. TechNova's UX team created an experience students genuinely love using.
TechNova turned our vague vision into a polished marketplace handling $2M+ in monthly transactions. The 3D property tours they built are industry-leading.
Their computer vision team achieved 99.2% defect detection accuracy on our assembly line. We reduced quality control costs by 60%. Truly impressive ML work.
TechNova migrated our legacy systems to a microservices architecture with zero downtime. Patient appointment wait times dropped by 45% post-launch.

fields.title: FinTech Transformation
fields.summary: Modernized payment processing platform, reducing latency by 40% and doubling throughput.
fields.challenge: PayFlow's legacy monolith struggled with 500ms+ latency during peak hours, causing transaction timeouts and customer churn. The system could not scale beyond 500 concurrent users.
fields.solution: We rebuilt the core payment engine as a microservices architecture on AWS with event-driven processing, Redis caching, and auto-scaling Kubernetes clusters. Implemented a real-time fraud detection layer using ML.
fields.results: Latency reduced from 500ms to 60ms (88% improvement). Throughput increased from 500 to 5,000+ concurrent users. Fraud detection accuracy improved to 99.2%.

fields.title: E-Commerce Scale-Up
fields.summary: Built real-time inventory system handling 10k+ concurrent users with zero downtime.
fields.challenge: ShopVerse flash sales crashed their servers every time. The existing system could not handle traffic spikes, leading to lost revenue and frustrated customers during peak shopping events.
fields.solution: Architected a distributed inventory system with event sourcing, real-time stock updates via WebSockets, and a queue-based order processing pipeline. Added CDN caching and edge rendering for product pages.
fields.results: Sustained 15,000+ concurrent users during flash sales. Page load time dropped from 4s to 0.8s. Revenue from flash sales increased 300% year-over-year.

fields.title: Healthcare Portal
fields.summary: HIPAA-compliant patient management system serving 50k+ users with telemedicine.
fields.challenge: MediCare Plus needed a secure, compliant patient portal that integrated scheduling, telemedicine, and electronic health records while meeting strict HIPAA requirements.
fields.solution: Built an end-to-end encrypted patient platform with role-based access control, integrated video consultations, appointment scheduling, and a FHIR-compliant EHR system. Deployed on HIPAA-compliant cloud infrastructure.
fields.results: 50,000+ active patients onboarded. Telemedicine visits increased 500%. Average appointment wait time reduced from 8 days to 2 days. Zero security incidents in 18 months.

fields.title: AI-Powered Analytics Platform
fields.summary: ML-driven business intelligence platform processing 1M+ events per day in real-time.
fields.challenge: DataGenius needed a real-time analytics platform that could process millions of data points daily, provide predictive insights, and render interactive dashboards without lag.
fields.solution: Built a streaming analytics pipeline with Kafka, Spark, and ClickHouse. Implemented ML models for anomaly detection and forecasting. Created customizable dashboards with D3.js and real-time WebSocket updates.
fields.results: Processes 1.2M+ events/day with sub-second latency. Predictive models achieve 94% accuracy. Customer retention improved by 45% with proactive insights.
